productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Formal Grey Accessory Gift Set
description: Specially woven on a Jacquard loom for vintage sophistication, this tie and pocket square set with cufflinks from Linos Perros is a great gift option or a delicious self-indulgence. The cosomopolitan man's formal wardrobe is not complete without colour options in ties, cufflinks and pocket kerchiefs. Tie Length: 150 cm Made of silky loom-woven fabric Black and grey check pattern Loop on the tie inner to keep the tongue in place Cufflinks Width: 1 cm Stone encrusted square cufflinks Hinged back to hold the cuff link in place Handkerchief Square handkerchief with a 30 cm width Made of loom-woven fabric with a matching pattern Accessory Set care Dry clean only
